mapper.update: update tb_banner set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_banner(name, image, goods_id, remarks, status) values(#{name}, #{image}, #{goodsId}, #{remarks}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, name, goods_id, remarks, image, status from tb_banner where id = #{id}

select image from tb_banner where id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_banner where status = false and id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select image from tb_banner where status = 1
